nodes.label: Tests for the SSH remote execution environment backend.
Regression tests for issue #11840.      macOS caps Unix domain socket paths at 1
A realistic macOS $TMPDIR + IPv6 host must still produce a         control socke
Same (user, host, port) must yield the same control socket so         ControlMas
Different (user, host, port) triples must produce different paths.
SSH persistent defaults to True (via TERMINAL_PERSISTENT_SHELL).
Per-backend env var overrides the global default.
TERMINAL_PERSISTENT_SHELL=false disables SSH persistent by default.
